creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Fadel from comment #3)

We cannot ensure that our users won't use the package commercially.  Also note the passage that says:

> You must conspicuously display this License on each original or modified copy
> of the Licensed Work. If you receive the Licensed Work in original or
> modified form from a third party, the terms and conditions set forth in this
> License apply to your use of that work.

So at the very least, the port must come with a pkg-message that displays the license on install.  I'd personally set no-auto-accept to ensure that the user reads and acknowledges the license.

With the text as is, I'm not certain enough about the license to commit a port based on this database in good faith.  Maybe someone else will.
